title: Enable Next.js Middleware and Display Reputation XP
context: The Element 5 frontend transition to backend APIs required route protection middleware and displaying user reputation XP in the header.
decision: Created src/middleware.ts pointing to src/proxy.ts to activate route interception. Updated src/components/ui/Header.tsx to display user.reputationXp in navigation bars.
consequences: Protected routes (such as /admin, /stageverse) now properly redirect unauthenticated users to /login. User profiles now show their current XP in real-time.

title: Replace 3D Canvas Background with 2D Animated Component and Optimize Mobile Layouts
context: The 3D HeroScene (using Three.js/Canvas) was causing performance bottlenecks on mobile/laptop browsers and had impurity lint warnings. Additionally, horizontal stats blocks had mobile alignment/overflow risks.
decision: Replaced HeroScene with a premium 2D CSS-animated HeroBackground. Refactored stats container to a three-column responsive grid and hoisted mapBackend helper in artist page to prevent declaration warnings.
consequences: Improved scroll smoothness, optimized frame rates, eliminated 3D rendering lag, and cleaned all remaining compilation and linting errors to complete next build successfully.
